hero.subtitleHighlight: access the market before the rest.

search.title: Where would you like to live or invest?

profile.title: Find the perfect opportunity for your next investment
profile.description: Leave us your details and what type of project you are looking for. We will contact you when a development in your area matches your profile.

zones.title: Exclusive Zones
zones.desc: Access to projects in high-growth areas.

form.successDesc: Your investment profile has been registered. A specialized advisor will contact you via WhatsApp shortly.
form.noProjectsWarning: "No projects in your area? Don't worry, we'll notify you as soon as an opportunity opens on the waiting list."
form.privacy: Your data is safe with us. We do not spam.

featuredProjects.title: Featured Projects
featuredProjects.emptyDesc: We are working on new investment opportunities.

howItWorks.title: The SevenToop Standard
howItWorks.description: We develop the complete commercialization process, from validation to signing, all integrated into a single platform.

01.title: Development creation
01.desc: The project is registered with all its basic and legally structured information.

02.title: Plan upload
02.desc: The developer uploads the technical masterplan of the urbanization or building.

03.title: Validation and interpretation
03.desc: Our system processes the document ensuring accurate geometry and subdivision.

04.title: Synchronization
04.desc: Units are paired with the database of prices, statuses, and history in real-time.

05.title: Commercial Masterplan Generation
05.desc: An interactive version optimized for investors and final buyers is rendered.

06.title: Real map projection
06.desc: The masterplan is geographically anchored to visualize the environment, accesses, and exact location.

07.title: 360° Tour Integration
07.desc: Immersive aerial views are linked with hotspots to the generated units and lots.

08.title: Commercialization activation
08.desc: The project opens to the market through our VIP community or the public sales channel.

forDevelopers.title: The Technological Partner for your Development

infrastructure.title: Real Estate Infrastructure
infrastructure.desc: We digitize your project: Interactive masterplan, 360° Virtual Tour, and real-time stock control.

community.title: Community and Launch
community.desc: We reach qualified investors first and maximize the impact of the official launch.

crm.title: CRM and Commercial Pipeline
crm.desc: Your sales team operating in an environment designed to close real estate transactions faster.

community.title: Arrive before the rest of the market
community.description: Be part of the investor network where real transactions happen. Choose your participation level.

open.name: Open Community
open.desc: For those looking to stay up-to-date with the real estate market and learn about new developments.

vip.name: VIP Community
vip.desc: For demanding investors looking to get first to the best returns.

testimonials.description: Real stories from developers, investors, and families already building their future with our platform.

mockData.name: Valeria Santoro
mockData.quote: Data transparency and projected returns are impeccable. SevenToop's 3D platform let us analyze everything remotely with total security.

mockData.name: Carlos Medina
mockData.quote: Showing clients the Masterplan with real-time availability closed three sales last month. It's a massive competitive advantage over traditional systems.

mockData.name: Agustina Rivas
mockData.quote: Since digitizing our development with SevenToop, lead conversion increased by 60%. The immersive experience sells itself.

mockData.name: Ignacio Ferrer
mockData.quote: Accessing Friends & Family phase opportunities through my VIP membership doubled my annual return. Technical data is highly accurate.

mockData.name: Mariana Costa
mockData.quote: We reduced marketing costs and expedited presales. SevenToop acts as our technological arm for premium commercialization.

mockData.name: Lucas Perea
mockData.quote: The technical rigor in verifying sqft and amenities gives me total peace of mind when recommending SevenToop projects to my corporate clients.

mockData.name: Florencia Giménez
mockData.quote: We bought our lot from abroad relying solely on the 360 tour. When we traveled to see the land in person, it was exactly as it looked online.

mockData.name: Esteban Quiroga
mockData.quote: The integrated CRM tool lets us manage construction progress and reservations in one place. Absolute digital transformation.

mockData.name: Sofía Armenta
mockData.quote: Finding lots with high appreciation potential is easy when you can see the projected financial cash flow side-by-side with the master plan.

mockData.name: Héctor Silva
mockData.quote: Working with developments listed on SevenToop gives me the confidence that they are serious and backed projects. Excellent curation.

mockData.name: Daniela Osorio
mockData.quote: Sending Masterplan links to potential buyers saves enormous amounts of time and questions. They understand the whole environment visually right away.

mockData.name: Miguel Rodríguez
mockData.quote: The exclusive presale portfolio has the best entry tickets I've seen in the last 5 years in the central region.

mockData.name: Camila Beltrán
mockData.quote: We were looking for security and an ecosystem that gave us certainty before investing our life savings. SevenToop delivered that and more.

mockData.name: Julián Viale
mockData.quote: Their 360 engine and render technology applied to the real map are from another planet. It raised the entire category of our whole neighborhood.

projects.title: Projects on SevenToop
